creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #4)

> I don't get what pkg has to do with this... can you elaborate?

pkg is how you install software on your system (unless you build ports from source, but even then pkg would be involved). To reproduce your issue, it's important to understand how you installed the programs in question (local repo, official repo and if official, which one [quarterly, latest, etc.]).

As php80 is deprecated, this not really being an arcanist-specific issue to begin with, and - most importantly - your problem has been solved, I'll close this PR as FIXED.
